events.text: Diagnosed the decay test: pressure rose from 464 → 1824 microns in 10 minutes (~136 microns/min), a large, non-leveling rise indicating either a leak (likely at a brazed joint) or significant residual moisture — the system fails the standing vacuum test and isn't ready to charge. Written to `/app/answer.json` with `decision: fail`, `value: 1824`, corrective actions (leak search, re-evacuation, retest).
